<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="fr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Maite - Saveurs du Terroir Ivoirien</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,600;0,800;1,500&family=Nunito:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Nunito',sans-serif;color:#2c1a0e;background:#fff;overflow-x:hidden}

/* ─── NAV ─────────────────────────────── */
nav{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:999;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(196,30,30,.12);border-bottom:3px solid #C41E1E}
.nav-wrap{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 20px;height:72px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}
.logo img{height:50px;object-fit:contain;display:block}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:28px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{text-decoration:none;color:#2c1a0e;font-weight:700;font-size:.84rem;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .2s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:#C41E1E}
.nav-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.lang-wrap{display:flex;border:2px solid #C41E1E;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden}
.lang-btn{padding:4px 13px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:#C41E1E;transition:all .2s}
.lang-btn.on{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff}
.cart-btn{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border:none;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:22px;font-size:.84rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;transition:background .2s}
.cart-btn:hover{background:#a51515}
.cart-n{background:#E8890A;color:#fff;border-radius:50%;width:19px;height:19px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:900}
.ham{display:none;background:none;border:none;font-size:1.5rem;cursor:pointer;color:#C41E1E}

/* ─── MOBILE MENU ────────────────────── */
.mob-menu{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(44,26,14,.97);z-index:2000;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:28px;transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .3s}
.mob-menu.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.mob-menu a{color:#fff;text-decoration:none;font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:700}
.mob-menu a:hover{color:#E8890A}
.mob-close{position:absolute;top:22px;right:22px;background:none;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:1.7rem;cursor:pointer}

/* ─── BANNER ─────────────────────────── */
.banner{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;text-align:center;padding:9px 16px;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.8px}

/* ─── HERO ───────────────────────────── */
#hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8f0 0%,#fff0e0 50%,#ffe4cc 100%);padding:70px 20px 60px;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
#hero::before{content:’’;position:absolute;top:-60px;right:-80px;width:400px;height:400px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(196,30,30,.06);pointer-events:none}
#hero::after{content:’’;position:absolute;bottom:-80px;left:-60px;width:300px;height:300px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(232,137,10,.07);pointer-events:none}
.hero-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:60px;align-items:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
.hero-chip{display:inline-block;background:#FFF0E0;border:1.5px solid #E8890A;color:#C41E1E;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:15px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:18px}
.hero-h1{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(2.2rem,5vw,3.4rem);font-weight:800;color:#2c1a0e;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:18px}
.hero-h1 em{font-style:italic;color:#C41E1E;display:block}
.hero-p{font-size:1rem;color:#6b4c30;line-height:1.8;margin-bottom:28px;max-width:460px}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-main{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border:none;padding:13px 30px;border-radius:25px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:all .25s;letter-spacing:.5px}
.btn-main:hover{background:#a51515;transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(196,30,30,.3)}
.btn-sec{background:transparent;color:#C41E1E;border:2px solid #C41E1E;padding:13px 30px;border-radius:25px;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;transition:all .25s}
.btn-sec:hover{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:28px;margin-top:32px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.hstat{text-align:center}
.hstat-n{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:800;color:#C41E1E}
.hstat-l{font-size:.72rem;color:#9a7055;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-top:2px}
.hero-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.hero-logo-circle{background:#fff;border-radius:50%;width:300px;height:300px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 40px rgba(196,30,30,.18),0 0 0 16px rgba(232,137,10,.1),0 0 0 32px rgba(196,30,30,.05)}
.hero-logo-circle img{width:240px;height:240px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:50%}

/* ─── ATOUTS ─────────────────────────── */
.atouts{background:#fff;padding:55px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid #f5e8dc}
.atouts-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px}
.atout{background:#fff8f2;border-radius:14px;padding:26px 20px;text-align:center;border:1px solid #f0ddd0;transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}
.atout:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(196,30,30,.1)}
.atout-ico{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:12px;display:block}
.atout-t{font-weight:700;font-size:.95rem;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:6px}
.atout-p{font-size:.8rem;color:#9a7055;line-height:1.6}

/* ─── CATALOGUE ──────────────────────── */
#catalogue{padding:70px 20px;background:#fdf8f4}
.sec-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:44px}
.sec-chip{display:inline-block;background:#FFF0E0;color:#C41E1E;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:15px;font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:10px}
.sec-h2{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:800;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:10px}
.sec-sub{font-size:.95rem;color:#9a7055;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;line-height:1.7}
.filters{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:40px}
.flt{background:#fff;border:2px solid #e8d8c8;color:#9a7055;padding:8px 20px;border-radius:20px;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s}
.flt.on,.flt:hover{background:#C41E1E;border-color:#C41E1E;color:#fff}
.pgrid{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:22px}
.pcard{background:#fff;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #f0ddd0;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(44,26,14,.07);transition:all .25s;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.pcard:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 14px 35px rgba(196,30,30,.14)}
.pcard-img{height:210px;overflow:hidden;background:#fff8f2;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative}
.pcard-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;transition:transform .35s}
.pcard:hover .pcard-img img{transform:scale(1.06)}
.pcard-badge{position:absolute;top:10px;left:10px;background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;padding:3px 11px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase}
.pcard-body{padding:16px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.pcard-name{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:7px;line-height:1.3}
.pcard-desc{font-size:.78rem;color:#9a7055;line-height:1.6;flex:1;margin-bottom:12px}
.pcard-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid #f5e8dc}
.pcard-price{display:flex;flex-direction:column}
.p-fcfa{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:#C41E1E}
.p-eur{font-size:.72rem;color:#b09070;margin-top:1px}
.add-btn{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border:none;font-size:1.4rem;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;flex-shrink:0;line-height:1}
.add-btn:hover{background:#E8890A;transform:scale(1.1)}
.add-btn.ok{background:#27ae60}

/* ─── A PROPOS ───────────────────────── */
#about{padding:80px 20px;background:#fff}
.about-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:70px;align-items:center}
.about-vis{position:relative}
.about-img{background:#fff8f2;border-radius:20px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(44,26,14,.15);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px;min-height:360px}
.about-img img{max-width:280px;max-height:280px;object-fit:contain}
.about-badge{position:absolute;bottom:-18px;right:-18px;background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border-radius:16px;padding:16px 20px;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,30,30,.3)}
.ab-n{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:800;color:#E8890A;line-height:1}
.ab-l{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1.4;margin-top:3px}
.about-txt{}
.about-chip{display:inline-block;background:#FFF0E0;color:#C41E1E;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:15px;font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px}
.about-h2{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.95rem;font-weight:800;color:#2c1a0e;line-height:1.25;margin-bottom:18px}
.about-p{font-size:.92rem;color:#6b4c30;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:14px}
.val-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px;margin-top:24px}
.val-item{background:#fff8f2;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;border-left:4px solid #C41E1E}
.val-t{font-weight:700;font-size:.87rem;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:3px}
.val-p{font-size:.76rem;color:#9a7055;line-height:1.5}

/* ─── CONTACT ────────────────────────── */
#contact{padding:70px 20px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#2c1a0e,#4a2a15)}
.contact-inner{max-width:1000px;margin:0 auto}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:50px;align-items:start;margin-top:40px}
.c-info-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:14px;margin-bottom:22px}
.c-ico{width:42px;height:42px;background:rgba(232,137,10,.18);border:1px solid rgba(232,137,10,.3);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0}
.c-lbl{font-size:.73rem;font-weight:700;color:#E8890A;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:3px}
.c-val{font-size:.9rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.8);line-height:1.5}
.c-form{background:rgba(255,255,255,.07);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:16px;padding:28px}
.f-group{margin-bottom:16px}
.f-label{display:block;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:7px}
.f-inp,.f-ta{width:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.09);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:9px;padding:11px 15px;color:#fff;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif;font-size:.9rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s}
.f-inp:focus,.f-ta:focus{border-color:#E8890A}
.f-inp::placeholder,.f-ta::placeholder{color:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
.f-ta{height:110px;resize:vertical}
.f-submit{width:100%;background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border:none;padding:13px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.92rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;letter-spacing:.5px;transition:background .2s;margin-top:4px}
.f-submit:hover{background:#E8890A}

/* ─── PANIER OVERLAY ─────────────────── */
.overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);z-index:3000;display:none}
.overlay.show{display:block}
.cart-panel{position:fixed;top:0;right:0;width:min(420px,100vw);height:100vh;background:#fff;z-index:3001;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:-8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.2);transform:translateX(100%);transition:transform .3s}
.cart-panel.show{transform:translateX(0)}
.cart-hd{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;padding:22px 20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-shrink:0}
.cart-hd h3{font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700}
.cart-x{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;font-size:1.4rem;cursor:pointer;line-height:1}
.cart-body{padding:16px;flex:1;overflow-y:auto}
.cart-empty-wrap{text-align:center;padding:50px 16px;color:#9a7055}
.cart-empty-ico{font-size:3rem;display:block;margin-bottom:12px}
.c-item{display:flex;gap:13px;padding:13px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f5e8dc;align-items:flex-start}
.c-item-img{width:66px;height:66px;border-radius:10px;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0}
.c-item-info{flex:1;min-width:0}
.c-item-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.87rem;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:3px}
.c-item-price{color:#C41E1E;font-weight:700;font-size:.87rem}
.c-item-price small{color:#9a7055;font-weight:400;font-size:.72rem;margin-left:5px}
.c-item-qty{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;margin-top:7px}
.qb{width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:#f5e8dc;border:none;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .2s;color:#2c1a0e}
.qb:hover{background:#C41E1E;color:#fff}
.qn{font-weight:700;min-width:18px;text-align:center;font-size:.9rem}
.c-rm{background:none;border:none;color:#C41E1E;cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;margin-left:auto;text-decoration:underline}
.cart-ft{padding:18px;border-top:2px solid #f5e8dc;flex-shrink:0}
.tot-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.87rem;color:#6b4c30;margin-bottom:6px}
.tot-main{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-family:‘Playfair Display’,serif;font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:#2c1a0e;margin-bottom:18px}
.tot-main span:last-child{color:#C41E1E}
.order-section{margin-bottom:14px}
.order-lbl{display:block;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;color:#2c1a0e;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:8px}
.order-inp{width:100%;border:2px solid #e8d8c8;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 13px;font-family:‘Nunito’,sans-serif;font-size:.87rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .2s;margin-bottom:7px;color:#2c1a0e}
.order-inp:focus{border-color:#C41E1E}
.pay-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:7px;margin-bottom:14px}
.pay-opt{border:2px solid #e8d8c8;border-radius:10px;padding:9px 5px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#9a7055}
.pay-opt.on,.pay-opt:hover{border-color:#C41E1E;background:#fff0e0;color:#C41E1E}
.pay-ico{font-size:1.2rem;display:block;margin-bottom:3px}
.btn-email{width:100%;background:#C41E1E;color:#fff;border:none;padding:13px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;margin-bottom:8px;letter-spacing:.3px}
.btn-email:hover{background:#a51515}
.btn-wa{width:100%;background:#25D366;color:#fff;border:none;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px}
.btn-wa:hover{background:#1da851}

/* ─── FOOTER ─────────────────────────── */
footer{background:#1a0f08;padding:44px 20px 18px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.55)}
.foot-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:36px;margin-bottom:36px}
.foot-brand img{height:52px;margin-bottom:13px;display:block}
.foot-tag{font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.7;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);max-width:220px}
.foot-col h4{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:13px;padding-bottom:7px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1)}
.foot-col ul{list-style:none}
.foot-col li{margin-bottom:7px}
.foot-col a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);text-decoration:none;font-size:.82rem;transition:color .2s}
.foot-col a:hover{color:#E8890A}
.foot-btm{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);padding-top:18px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;font-size:.75rem}
.foot-btm span{color:#E8890A}

/* ─── TOAST ──────────────────────────── */
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:28px;background:#27ae60;color:#fff;padding:13px 22px;border-radius:10px;font-weight:700;font-size:.87rem;z-index:9999;transform:translateY(80px);opacity:0;transition:all .28s;pointer-events:none}
.toast.show{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}

/* ─── REVEAL ─────────────────────────── */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .65s,transform .65s}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}

/* ─── RESPONSIVE ─────────────────────── */
@media(max-width:900px){
.hero-inner,.about-inner,.contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px}
.hero-logo{display:none}
.atouts-inner{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
.foot-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr}
.nav-links{display:none}
.ham{display:block}
}
@media(max-width:580px){
.atouts-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.foot-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.val-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
.hero-stats{gap:18px}
}
</style>

</head>
<body>

<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<!-- Mobile menu -->

<div class="mob-menu" id="mobMenu">
  <button class="mob-close" onclick="closeMob()">&#10005;</button>
  <a href="#hero" onclick="closeMob()" data-fr="Accueil" data-en="Home">Accueil</a>
  <a href="#catalogue" onclick="closeMob()" data-fr="Catalogue" data-en="Catalogue">Catalogue</a>
  <a href="#about" onclick="closeMob()" data-fr="A propos" data-en="About">A propos</a>
  <a href="#contact" onclick="closeMob()" data-fr="Contact" data-en="Contact">Contact</a>
</div>

<!-- Overlay + panier -->

<div class="overlay" id="overlay" onclick="closeCart()"></div>
<div class="cart-panel" id="cartPanel">
  <div class="cart-hd">
    <h3 data-fr="Mon Panier" data-en="My Cart">Mon Panier</h3>
    <button class="cart-x" onclick="closeCart()">&#10005;</button>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-body" id="cartBody">
    <div class="cart-empty-wrap" id="cartEmpty">
      <span class="cart-empty-ico">&#128722;</span>
      <p data-fr="Votre panier est vide" data-en="Your cart is empty">Votre panier est vide</p>
    </div>
    <div id="cartItems"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="cart-ft" id="cartFt" style="display:none">
    <div class="tot-row"><span data-fr="Sous-total" data-en="Subtotal">Sous-total</span><span id="stFcfa">0</span></div>
    <div class="tot-row"><span></span><span id="stEur" style="color:#9a7055;font-size:.82rem"></span></div>
    <div class="tot-main"><span data-fr="Total" data-en="Total">Total</span><span id="totFcfa">0 FCFA</span></div>
    <div class="order-section">
      <span class="order-lbl" data-fr="Vos coordonnees" data-en="Your details">Vos coordonnees</span>
      <input class="order-inp" id="oName" type="text" placeholder="Nom complet" data-pfr="Nom complet" data-pen="Full name">
      <input class="order-inp" id="oPhone" type="tel" placeholder="Telephone / WhatsApp" data-pfr="Telephone / WhatsApp" data-pen="Phone / WhatsApp">
      <input class="order-inp" id="oAddr" type="text" placeholder="Adresse de livraison" data-pfr="Adresse de livraison" data-pen="Delivery address">
    </div>
    <div class="order-section">
      <span class="order-lbl" data-fr="Paiement" data-en="Payment">Paiement</span>
      <div class="pay-grid">
        <div class="pay-opt on" data-p="orange" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#127813;</span>Orange Money</div>
        <div class="pay-opt" data-p="wave" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#127754;</span>Wave</div>
        <div class="pay-opt" data-p="mtn" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#128242;</span>MTN Money</div>
        <div class="pay-opt" data-p="visa" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#128179;</span>Carte Bancaire</div>
        <div class="pay-opt" data-p="prepaid" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#128180;</span>Carte Prepayee</div>
        <div class="pay-opt" data-p="cash" onclick="selPay(this)"><span class="pay-ico">&#128181;</span>Especes</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button class="btn-email" onclick="sendEmail()" data-fr="Envoyer par Email" data-en="Send by Email">Envoyer par Email</button>
    <button class="btn-wa" onclick="sendWA()">
      <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413Z"/></svg>
      <span data-fr="Commander via WhatsApp" data-en="Order via WhatsApp">Commander via WhatsApp</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Banniere -->

<div class="banner" data-fr="Livraison Abidjan &amp; Expeditions Afrique, Europe, Amerique, Asie - Produits 100% naturels - Sans glutamate ni conservateur" data-en="Delivery Abidjan &amp; Shipping to Africa, Europe, America, Asia - 100% natural - No glutamate or preservatives">Livraison Abidjan &amp; Expeditions Afrique, Europe, Amerique, Asie - Produits 100% naturels - Sans glutamate ni conservateur</div>

<!-- NAV -->

<nav>
  <div class="nav-wrap">
    <a href="#hero" class="logo"><img id="navLogo" src="" alt="Maite"></a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#hero" data-fr="Accueil" data-en="Home">Accueil</a></li>
      <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Catalogue" data-en="Catalogue">Catalogue</a></li>
      <li><a href="#about" data-fr="A propos" data-en="About">A propos</a></li>
      <li><a href="#contact" data-fr="Contact" data-en="Contact">Contact</a></li>
    </ul>
    <div class="nav-right">
      <div class="lang-wrap">
        <button class="lang-btn on" onclick="setLang('fr')">FR</button>
        <button class="lang-btn" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
      </div>
      <button class="cart-btn" onclick="openCart()">
        &#127873; <span data-fr="Panier" data-en="Cart">Panier</span>
        <span class="cart-n" id="cartN">0</span>
      </button>
      <button class="ham" onclick="document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.add('show')">&#9776;</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->

<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="rv">
      <div class="hero-chip" data-fr="Saveurs du Terroir Ivoirien" data-en="Flavors of the Ivorian Terroir">Saveurs du Terroir Ivoirien</div>
      <h1 class="hero-h1">
        <span data-fr="Les Saveurs" data-en="The Flavors">Les Saveurs</span>
        <em data-fr="Maite" data-en="Maite">Maite</em>
      </h1>
      <p class="hero-p" data-fr="Maite, qui signifie grand-mere en dialecte Bete, est la marque ivoirienne qui preserves et transmet les saveurs authentiques du terroir. Produits 100% naturels, sans glutamate ni conservateur." data-en="Maite, meaning grandmother in the Bete dialect, is the Ivorian brand that preserves authentic terroir flavors. 100% natural products, free from glutamate and preservatives.">Maite, qui signifie grand-mere en dialecte Bete, est la marque ivoirienne qui preserve et transmet les saveurs authentiques du terroir. Produits 100% naturels, sans glutamate ni conservateur.</p>
      <div class="hero-btns">
        <a href="#catalogue" class="btn-main" data-fr="Voir le Catalogue" data-en="View Catalogue">Voir le Catalogue</a>
        <a href="#about" class="btn-sec" data-fr="Notre Histoire" data-en="Our Story">Notre Histoire</a>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stats">
        <div class="hstat"><div class="hstat-n">29+</div><div class="hstat-l" data-fr="Produits" data-en="Products">Produits</div></div>
        <div class="hstat"><div class="hstat-n">100%</div><div class="hstat-l" data-fr="Naturel" data-en="Natural">Naturel</div></div>
        <div class="hstat"><div class="hstat-n">C.I.</div><div class="hstat-l" data-fr="Made in Ivory Coast" data-en="Made in Ivory Coast">Made in C.I.</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-logo rv">
      <div class="hero-logo-circle">
        <img id="heroLogo" src="" alt="Maite">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ATOUTS -->

<section class="atouts">
  <div class="atouts-inner">
    <div class="atout rv">
      <span class="atout-ico">&#127807;</span>
      <div class="atout-t" data-fr="100% Naturel" data-en="100% Natural">100% Naturel</div>
      <p class="atout-p" data-fr="Sans colorant, sans glutamate ajoute, sans conservateur. La nature dans votre assiette." data-en="No coloring, no added glutamate, no preservatives. Nature on your plate.">Sans colorant, sans glutamate ajoute, sans conservateur.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="atout rv">
      <span class="atout-ico">&#127464;&#127470;</span>
      <div class="atout-t" data-fr="Fierte Ivoirienne" data-en="Ivorian Pride">Fierte Ivoirienne</div>
      <p class="atout-p" data-fr="Fabrique en Cote d'Ivoire. Valorise les saveurs et ingredients locaux." data-en="Made in Ivory Coast. Celebrates local flavors and ingredients.">Fabrique en Cote d'Ivoire. Valorise les saveurs locales.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="atout rv">
      <span class="atout-ico">&#127859;</span>
      <div class="atout-t" data-fr="Facile a preparer" data-en="Easy to prepare">Facile a preparer</div>
      <p class="atout-p" data-fr="Produits deshydrates pour preparer des plats savoureux en quelques minutes." data-en="Dehydrated products to prepare flavorful dishes in minutes.">Plats savoureux en quelques minutes.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="atout rv">
      <span class="atout-ico">&#128666;</span>
      <div class="atout-t" data-fr="Livraison rapide" data-en="Fast delivery">Livraison rapide</div>
      <p class="atout-p" data-fr="Livraison Abidjan. Expeditions en Afrique, Europe, Amerique et Asie. Paiement Mobile Money, carte ou especes." data-en="Delivery in Abidjan. Shipping to Africa, Europe, America and Asia. Mobile Money, card or cash payment.">Livraison Abidjan. Expeditions internationales.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CATALOGUE -->

<section id="catalogue">
  <div class="sec-header rv">
    <div class="sec-chip" data-fr="Nos Produits" data-en="Our Products">Nos Produits</div>
    <h2 class="sec-h2" data-fr="Catalogue Maite" data-en="Maite Catalogue">Catalogue Maite</h2>
    <p class="sec-sub" data-fr="Decouvrez nos produits alimentaires ivoiriens. Ajoutez au panier et commandez facilement." data-en="Discover our Ivorian food products. Add to cart and order easily.">Decouvrez nos produits alimentaires ivoiriens.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="filters rv">
    <button class="flt on" onclick="doFilter(this,'all')" data-fr="Tous" data-en="All">Tous</button>
    <button class="flt" onclick="doFilter(this,'foufou')" data-fr="Foufou et Foutou" data-en="Foufou and Foutou">Foufou et Foutou</button>
    <button class="flt" onclick="doFilter(this,'sauce')" data-fr="Sauces" data-en="Sauces">Sauces</button>
    <button class="flt" onclick="doFilter(this,'riz')" data-fr="Riz Gras" data-en="Spiced Rice">Riz Gras</button>
    <button class="flt" onclick="doFilter(this,'epice')" data-fr="Epices et Marinades" data-en="Spices and Marinades">Epices et Marinades</button>
  </div>
  <div class="pgrid" id="pgrid"></div>
</section>

<!-- A PROPOS -->

<section id="about">
  <div class="about-inner">
    <div class="about-vis rv">
      <div class="about-img">
        <img id="aboutLogo" src="" alt="Maite">
      </div>
      <div class="about-badge">
        <div class="ab-n">&#10024;</div>
        <div class="ab-l">Saveurs<br>Authentiques</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="rv">
      <div class="about-chip" data-fr="Notre Histoire" data-en="Our Story">Notre Histoire</div>
      <h2 class="about-h2" data-fr="Maite, l'ame de la cuisine ivoirienne" data-en="Maite, the soul of Ivorian cuisine">Maite, l'ame de la cuisine ivoirienne</h2>
      <p class="about-p" data-fr="Maite est une marque de Robate Industries, entreprise familiale ivoirienne fondee avec la conviction que les saveurs traditionnelles de Cote d'Ivoire meritent d'etre preservees et partagees. Le nom Maite signifie grand-mere en dialecte Bete, et rend hommage aux generations de femmes qui ont transmis leur savoir-faire culinaire." data-en="Maite is a brand of Robate Industries, an Ivorian family company founded with the conviction that the traditional flavors of Ivory Coast deserve to be preserved and shared. The name Maite means grandmother in the Bete dialect, and pays tribute to generations of women who passed on their culinary expertise.">Maite est une marque de Robate Industries, entreprise familiale ivoirienne fondee avec la conviction que les saveurs traditionnelles de Cote d'Ivoire meritent d'etre preservees et partagees. Le nom Maite signifie grand-mere en dialecte Bete.</p>
      <p class="about-p" data-fr="Chaque produit Maite est le fruit d'un savoir-faire artisanal : selection rigoureuse des ingredients locaux, recettes fideles aux traditions, et procedes de deshydratation qui preservent toutes les saveurs. Sans glutamate ajoute, sans conservateur, sans colorant artificiel." data-en="Every Maite product is the fruit of artisanal expertise: rigorous selection of local ingredients, recipes faithful to tradition, and dehydration processes that preserve all flavors. No added glutamate, no preservatives, no artificial coloring.">Chaque produit Maite est fabrique avec une selection rigoureuse des ingredients locaux, des recettes fideles aux traditions, sans glutamate ajoute ni conservateur.</p>
      <div class="val-grid">
        <div class="val-item">
          <div class="val-t" data-fr="Qualite Naturelle" data-en="Natural Quality">&#127807; Qualite Naturelle</div>
          <p class="val-p" data-fr="Ingredients 100% naturels selectionnes en Cote d'Ivoire." data-en="100% natural ingredients selected in Ivory Coast.">Ingredients 100% naturels.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="val-item">
          <div class="val-t" data-fr="Tradition et Innovation" data-en="Tradition and Innovation">&#127775; Tradition et Innovation</div>
          <p class="val-p" data-fr="Recettes ancestrales adaptees aux modes de vie modernes." data-en="Ancestral recipes adapted to modern lifestyles.">Recettes ancestrales modernisees.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="val-item">
          <div class="val-t" data-fr="Produit Local" data-en="Local Product">&#127464;&#127470; Produit Local</div>
          <p class="val-p" data-fr="Fabrique en Cote d'Ivoire pour soutenir l'economie locale." data-en="Made in Ivory Coast to support the local economy.">Fabrique et soutient l'economie locale.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="val-item">
          <div class="val-t" data-fr="Fait avec Amour" data-en="Made with Love">&#128153; Fait avec Amour</div>
          <p class="val-p" data-fr="La passion d'une grand-mere pour les saveurs de son terroir." data-en="A grandmother's passion for the flavors of her terroir.">La passion d'une grand-mere.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->

<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="sec-header rv" style="color:#fff">
      <div class="sec-chip" data-fr="Nous contacter" data-en="Contact us">Nous contacter</div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2" style="color:#fff" data-fr="Parlons-nous" data-en="Let's talk">Parlons-nous</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub" style="color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)" data-fr="Pour toute question, commande en gros ou partenariat." data-en="For any question, bulk order or partnership.">Pour toute question, commande en gros ou partenariat.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="rv">
        <div class="c-info-item">
          <div class="c-ico">&#128222;</div>
          <div><div class="c-lbl" data-fr="Telephone / WhatsApp" data-en="Phone / WhatsApp">Telephone / WhatsApp</div><div class="c-val">+225 XX XX XX XX XX</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-item">
          <div class="c-ico">&#9993;</div>
          <div><div class="c-lbl">Email</div><div class="c-val">contact@maite-ci.com</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-item">
          <div class="c-ico">&#128205;</div>
          <div><div class="c-lbl" data-fr="Adresse" data-en="Address">Adresse</div><div class="c-val">Abidjan, Cote d'Ivoire<br><small style="color:#E8890A;font-size:.8rem">&#127758; Expeditions : Afrique &bull; Europe &bull; Amerique &bull; Asie</small></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="c-info-item">
          <div class="c-ico">&#128337;</div>
          <div><div class="c-lbl" data-fr="Horaires" data-en="Hours">Horaires</div><div class="c-val" data-fr="Lun - Sam : 8h - 18h" data-en="Mon - Sat: 8am - 6pm">Lun - Sam : 8h - 18h</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="c-form rv">
        <div class="f-group">
          <label class="f-label" data-fr="Nom complet" data-en="Full name">Nom complet</label>
          <input class="f-inp" id="cNom" type="text" data-pfr="Votre nom" data-pen="Your name" placeholder="Votre nom">
        </div>
        <div class="f-group">
          <label class="f-label" data-fr="Email ou telephone" data-en="Email or phone">Email ou telephone</label>
          <input class="f-inp" id="cContact" type="text" data-pfr="Email ou WhatsApp" data-pen="Email or WhatsApp" placeholder="Email ou WhatsApp">
        </div>
        <div class="f-group">
          <label class="f-label" data-fr="Message" data-en="Message">Message</label>
          <textarea class="f-ta" id="cMsg" data-pfr="Votre message..." data-pen="Your message..." placeholder="Votre message..."></textarea>
        </div>
        <button class="f-submit" onclick="sendContact()" data-fr="Envoyer le message" data-en="Send message">Envoyer le message</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->

<footer>
  <div class="foot-inner">
    <div>
      <img id="footLogo" src="" alt="Maite">
      <p class="foot-tag" data-fr="Saveurs authentiques du terroir ivoirien. Produits naturels pour retrouver le gout des plats de grand-mere." data-en="Authentic flavors of the Ivorian terroir. Natural products to rediscover grandmother's dishes.">Saveurs authentiques du terroir ivoirien.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-col">
      <h4 data-fr="Navigation" data-en="Navigation">Navigation</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#hero" data-fr="Accueil" data-en="Home">Accueil</a></li>
        <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Catalogue" data-en="Catalogue">Catalogue</a></li>
        <li><a href="#about" data-fr="A propos" data-en="About">A propos</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contact" data-fr="Contact" data-en="Contact">Contact</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-col">
      <h4 data-fr="Categories" data-en="Categories">Categories</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Foufou et Foutou" data-en="Foufou and Foutou">Foufou et Foutou</a></li>
        <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Sauces" data-en="Sauces">Sauces</a></li>
        <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Riz Gras" data-en="Spiced Rice">Riz Gras</a></li>
        <li><a href="#catalogue" data-fr="Epices et Marinades" data-en="Spices and Marinades">Epices et Marinades</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-col">
      <h4 data-fr="Infos" data-en="Info">Infos</h4>
      <ul>
        <li><a href="#contact" data-fr="Nous contacter" data-en="Contact us">Nous contacter</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" data-fr="Robate Industries" data-en="Robate Industries">Robate Industries</a></li>
        <li><a href="#" data-fr="Livraison" data-en="Delivery">Livraison</a></li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="foot-btm">
    <div>2025 <span>Maite</span> - Robate Industries. <span data-fr="Tous droits reserves." data-en="All rights reserved.">Tous droits reserves.</span></div>
    <div data-fr="Fait avec coeur en Cote d'Ivoire" data-en="Made with love in Ivory Coast">Fait avec coeur en Cote d'Ivoire</div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
// ── DATA ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const LOGO = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";
const PRODUCTS = [{id:"foufou_banane",cat:"foufou",fr:"Foufou Banane",en:"Banana Foufou",dfr:"Farine de banane plantain 100% naturelle, sans colorant. Pour 3-4 personnes. 500g",den:"100% natural plantain banana flour, no coloring. For 3-4 people. 500g",fcfa:2500,eur:3.81,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"foutou_banane",cat:"foufou",fr:"Foutou Banane",en:"Banana Foutou",dfr:"Foutou banane deshydrate, a ne pas cuire. Saveur du terroir. Pour 2-3 personnes. 500g",den:"Dehydrated banana foutou, no cooking needed. Authentic flavor. For 2-3 people. 500g",fcfa:2500,eur:3.81,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"foufou_igname",cat:"foufou",fr:"Foufou Igname",en:"Yam Foufou",dfr:"Farine d'igname 100% naturelle, sans additif. Preparation facile et rapide. 500g",den:"100% natural yam flour, additive-free. Easy and quick preparation. 500g",fcfa:2500,eur:3.81,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_aubergine",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Aubergine",en:"Eggplant Sauce",dfr:"Sauce deshydratee a l'aubergine. Riche en gout, sans glutamate ni conservateur. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Dehydrated eggplant sauce. Rich flavor, no glutamate or preservatives. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_arachide",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Arachide",en:"Peanut Sauce",dfr:"Sauce arachide allegee en matieres grasses, sans glutamate. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Low-fat peanut sauce, no glutamate. Rich and creamy. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_djoumgble",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Djoumgble",en:"Djoumgble Sauce",dfr:"Sauce traditionnelle au Djoumgble. Saveur authentique ivoirienne. Sans conservateur. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Traditional Djoumgble sauce. Authentic Ivorian flavor. No preservatives. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_pistache",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Pistache",en:"Pistachio Sauce",dfr:"Sauce pistache riche en gout, sans glutamate ajoute. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Rich pistachio sauce, no added glutamate. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_gnangnan",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Gnangnan",en:"Gnangnan Sauce",dfr:"Sauce Gnangnan traditionnelle, saveur du terroir. Pour 2-3 personnes.",den:"Traditional Gnangnan sauce, terroir flavor. For 2-3 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_kaklou",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Kaklou",en:"Kaklou Sauce",dfr:"Sauce Kaklou aux epices originales, sans glutamate. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Kaklou sauce with original spices, no glutamate. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_kope",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Kope",en:"Kope Sauce",dfr:"Sauce Kope a la feuille de baobab, sans glutamate. Pour 2-3 personnes.",den:"Kope sauce with baobab leaves, no glutamate. For 2-3 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"sauce_feuilles_patate",cat:"sauce",fr:"Sauce Feuilles de Patate",en:"Sweet Potato Leaf Sauce",dfr:"Sauce aux feuilles de patate sechees, epices originales, sans conservateur. Pour 3-4 personnes.",den:"Dried sweet potato leaf sauce, original spices, no preservatives. For 3-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"riz_tomate",cat:"riz",fr:"Riz Gras Tomate Epices",en:"Tomato Spiced Rice",dfr:"Assaisonnement riz gras tomate et epices, sans glutamate. Pour 2-4 personnes.",den:"Tomato spiced rice seasoning, no glutamate. For 2-4 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"riz_epices",cat:"riz",fr:"Riz Gras Epices",en:"Spiced Rice",dfr:"Assaisonnement riz gras aux epices \u2014 cannelle, poivre et aromates. Pour 2-3 personnes.",den:"Spiced rice seasoning \u2014 cinnamon, pepper and aromatics. For 2-3 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"riz_lafri",cat:"riz",fr:"Riz Gras Soumara Lafri",en:"Soumara Lafri Rice",dfr:"Assaisonnement riz gras au Soumara Lafri. Saveurs ivoriennes authentiques. Pour 2-3 personnes.",den:"Soumara Lafri rice seasoning. Authentic Ivorian flavors. For 2-3 people.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"piment",cat:"epice",fr:"Piment Assaisonne",en:"Seasoned Chili",dfr:"Piment grille et assaisonne aux epices ivoriennes. Flacon refermable.",den:"Grilled and seasoned chili with Ivorian spices. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"soumbala",cat:"epice",fr:"Soumbala Assaisonne",en:"Seasoned Soumbala",dfr:"Soumbala (nere fermente) assaisonne. Base essentielle des sauces ivoriennes. Flacon refermable.",den:"Seasoned soumbala (fermented nere). Essential base for Ivorian sauces. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"marinade_poisson",cat:"epice",fr:"Marinade Poisson",en:"Fish Marinade",dfr:"Marinade poisson aux epices naturelles. Oignon, paprika et aromates. Flacon refermable.",den:"Fish marinade with natural spices. Onion, paprika and aromatics. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"marinade_poulet",cat:"epice",fr:"Marinade Poulet",en:"Chicken Marinade",dfr:"Marinade poulet aux epices naturelles ivoriennes. Sans conservateur. Flacon refermable.",den:"Chicken marinade with natural Ivorian spices. No preservatives. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"marinade_boeuf",cat:"epice",fr:"Marinade Boeuf",en:"Beef Marinade",dfr:"Marinade boeuf aux epices naturelles. Parfaite pour grillades et ragouts. Flacon refermable.",den:"Beef marinade with natural spices. Perfect for grills and stews. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"supor",cat:"epice",fr:"Assaisonnement Sup'Or",en:"Sup'Or Seasoning",dfr:"Melange d'epices premium Sup'Or pour toutes vos preparations. Flacon refermable.",den:"Premium Sup'Or spice blend for all your preparations. Resealable bottle.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"crevette_fumee",cat:"epice",fr:"Crevette Fumee Assaisonnee",en:"Seasoned Smoked Shrimp",dfr:"Crevette fumee et assaisonnee. Saveur marine intense pour vos sauces et plats.",den:"Smoked and seasoned shrimp. Intense sea flavor for your sauces and dishes.",fcfa:1000,eur:1.52,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"poivre",cat:"epice",fr:"Poudre de Poivre Noir",en:"Black Pepper Powder",dfr:"Poudre de poivre noir 100% naturel. Epices du terroir. Arome puissant et persistant.",den:"100% natural black pepper powder. Terroir spices. Powerful and persistent aroma.",fcfa:2000,eur:3.05,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"gingembre",cat:"epice",fr:"Poudre de Gingembre",en:"Ginger Powder",dfr:"Poudre de gingembre 100% naturelle. Epices du terroir. Anti-inflammatoire et savoureux.",den:"100% natural ginger powder. Terroir spices. Anti-inflammatory and flavorful.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"},
{id:"curcuma",cat:"epice",fr:"Poudre de Curcuma",en:"Turmeric Powder",dfr:"Poudre de curcuma 100% naturelle. Riche en antioxydants. Poids net 110g.",den:"100% natural turmeric powder. Rich in antioxidants. Net weight 110g.",fcfa:1500,eur:2.29,img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"}];

// Set logos
document.getElementById('navLogo').src = LOGO;
document.getElementById('heroLogo').src = LOGO;
document.getElementById('aboutLogo').src = LOGO;
document.getElementById('footLogo').src = LOGO;

// ── LANG ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
let lang = 'fr';
let curFilter = 'all';
let cart = [];
let payMode = 'orange';

function setLang(l) {
  lang = l;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lang-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('on', b.textContent.toLowerCase() === l));
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-fr]').forEach(el => {
    const t = l === 'fr' ? el.dataset.fr : el.dataset.en;
    if (!t) return;
    if (el.tagName === 'INPUT' || el.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') el.placeholder = t;
    else el.textContent = t;
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-pfr]').forEach(el => {
    el.placeholder = l === 'fr' ? el.dataset.pfr : el.dataset.pen;
  });
  renderProducts(curFilter);
  renderCart();
}

// ── CATALOGUE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
const catNames = {
  foufou: {fr:'Foufou & Foutou', en:'Foufou & Foutou'},
  sauce: {fr:'Sauce', en:'Sauce'},
  riz: {fr:'Riz Gras', en:'Spiced Rice'},
  epice: {fr:'Epices', en:'Spices'}
};

function doFilter(btn, cat) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.flt').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('on'));
  btn.classList.add('on');
  curFilter = cat;
  renderProducts(cat);
}

function renderProducts(cat) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('pgrid');
  const list = cat === 'all' ? PRODUCTS : PRODUCTS.filter(p => p.cat === cat);
  grid.innerHTML = list.map(p => {
    const name = lang === 'fr' ? p.fr : p.en;
    const desc = lang === 'fr' ? p.dfr : p.den;
    const badge = (catNames[p.cat] || {})[lang] || p.cat;
    return '<div class="pcard">' +
      '<div class="pcard-img">' +
        '<img src="' + p.img + '" alt="' + name + '" loading="lazy">' +
        '<div class="pcard-badge">' + badge + '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<div class="pcard-body">' +
        '<div class="pcard-name">' + name + '</div>' +
        '<p class="pcard-desc">' + desc + '</p>' +
        '<div class="pcard-foot">' +
          '<div class="pcard-price">' +
            '<span class="p-fcfa">' + p.fcfa.toLocaleString() + ' FCFA</span>' +
            '<span class="p-eur">' + p.eur.toFixed(2) + ' EUR</span>' +
          '</div>' +
          '<button class="add-btn" id="ab-' + p.id + '" onclick="addCart(\'' + p.id + '\')">+</button>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }).join('');
}

// ── CART ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function addCart(id) {
  const p = PRODUCTS.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  const ex = cart.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (ex) ex.qty++;
  else cart.push(Object.assign({}, p, {qty: 1}));
  updateCartN();
  renderCart();
  const nm = lang === 'fr' ? p.fr : p.en;
  showToast(nm + (lang === 'fr' ? ' ajoute au panier' : ' added to cart'));
  const btn = document.getElementById('ab-' + id);
  if (btn) { btn.classList.add('ok'); btn.textContent = '\u2713'; setTimeout(() => { btn.classList.remove('ok'); btn.textContent = '+'; }, 1400); }
}

function rmCart(id) { cart = cart.filter(x => x.id !== id); updateCartN(); renderCart(); }

function chgQty(id, d) {
  const it = cart.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!it) return;
  it.qty += d;
  if (it.qty <= 0) rmCart(id); else { updateCartN(); renderCart(); }
}

function updateCartN() {
  document.getElementById('cartN').textContent = cart.reduce((s, x) => s + x.qty, 0);
}

function totals() {
  return { fcfa: cart.reduce((s,x) => s + x.fcfa*x.qty, 0), eur: cart.reduce((s,x) => s + x.eur*x.qty, 0) };
}

function renderCart() {
  const items = document.getElementById('cartItems');
  const empty = document.getElementById('cartEmpty');
  const ft = document.getElementById('cartFt');
  if (!cart.length) { items.innerHTML = ''; empty.style.display = 'block'; ft.style.display = 'none'; return; }
  empty.style.display = 'none'; ft.style.display = 'block';
  items.innerHTML = cart.map(it => {
    const nm = lang === 'fr' ? it.fr : it.en;
    return '<div class="c-item">' +
      '<img class="c-item-img" src="' + it.img + '" alt="' + nm + '">' +
      '<div class="c-item-info">' +
        '<div class="c-item-name">' + nm + '</div>' +
        '<div class="c-item-price">' + (it.fcfa*it.qty).toLocaleString() + ' FCFA <small>' + (it.eur*it.qty).toFixed(2) + ' EUR</small></div>' +
        '<div class="c-item-qty">' +
          '<button class="qb" onclick="chgQty(\'' + it.id + '\',-1)">\u2212</button>' +
          '<span class="qn">' + it.qty + '</span>' +
          '<button class="qb" onclick="chgQty(\'' + it.id + '\',1)">+</button>' +
          '<button class="c-rm" onclick="rmCart(\'' + it.id + '\')">' + (lang==='fr'?'Retirer':'Remove') + '</button>' +
        '</div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }).join('');
  const t = totals();
  document.getElementById('stFcfa').textContent = t.fcfa.toLocaleString() + ' FCFA';
  document.getElementById('stEur').textContent = t.eur.toFixed(2) + ' EUR';
  document.getElementById('totFcfa').textContent = t.fcfa.toLocaleString() + ' FCFA';
}

function selPay(el) { document.querySelectorAll('.pay-opt').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('on')); el.classList.add('on'); payMode = el.dataset.p; }

function buildOrder() {
  const n = document.getElementById('oName').value || '?';
  const ph = document.getElementById('oPhone').value || '?';
  const ad = document.getElementById('oAddr').value || '?';
  const pm = {orange:'Orange Money',wave:'Wave',mtn:'MTN Money',visa:'Carte Bancaire',prepaid:'Carte Prepayee',cash:'Especes'};
  const lines = cart.map(i => (lang==='fr'?i.fr:i.en) + ' x' + i.qty + ' = ' + (i.fcfa*i.qty).toLocaleString() + ' FCFA').join('\n');
  const t = totals();
  return (lang==='fr'?'COMMANDE MAITE':'MAITE ORDER') + '\n\n' +
    (lang==='fr'?'Client':'Customer') + ': ' + n + '\n' +
    (lang==='fr'?'Tel':'Phone') + ': ' + ph + '\n' +
    (lang==='fr'?'Adresse':'Address') + ': ' + ad + '\n\n' +
    (lang==='fr'?'ARTICLES':'ITEMS') + ':\n' + lines + '\n\n' +
    'TOTAL: ' + t.fcfa.toLocaleString() + ' FCFA (' + t.eur.toFixed(2) + ' EUR)\n' +
    (lang==='fr'?'Paiement':'Payment') + ': ' + (pm[payMode]||payMode);
}

function sendEmail() {
  if (!cart.length) { showToast(lang==='fr'?'Panier vide !':'Empty cart!'); return; }
  const s = lang==='fr'?'Commande Maite':'Maite Order';
  window.open('mailto:contact@maite-ci.com?subject='+encodeURIComponent(s)+'&body='+encodeURIComponent(buildOrder()));
}
function sendWA() {
  if (!cart.length) { showToast(lang==='fr'?'Panier vide !':'Empty cart!'); return; }
  window.open('https://wa.me/22500000000?text='+encodeURIComponent(buildOrder()));
}

function openCart() { document.getElementById('overlay').classList.add('show'); document.getElementById('cartPanel').classList.add('show'); }
function closeCart() { document.getElementById('overlay').classList.remove('show'); document.getElementById('cartPanel').classList.remove('show'); }

// ── CONTACT ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
function sendContact() {
  const n = document.getElementById('cNom').value;
  const c = document.getElementById('cContact').value;
  const m = document.getElementById('cMsg').value;
  if (!n || !m) { showToast(lang==='fr'?'Remplissez les champs.':'Please fill in the fields.'); return; }
  window.open('mailto:contact@maite-ci.com?subject='+encodeURIComponent('Message - Site Maite')+'&body='+encodeURIComponent('Nom: '+n+'\nContact: '+c+'\n\n'+m));
  showToast(lang==='fr'?'Message envoye !':'Message sent!');
}

// ── TOAST ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showToast(msg) { const t = document.getElementById('toast'); t.textContent = msg; t.classList.add('show'); setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2600); }

// ── MOBILE MENU ───────────────────────────────────────────────
function closeMob() { document.getElementById('mobMenu').classList.remove('show'); }

// ── REVEAL ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const ro = new IntersectionObserver(es => es.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('in'); }), {threshold:.08});
document.querySelectorAll('.rv').forEach(el => ro.observe(el));

// ── SMOOTH SCROLL ─────────────────────────────────────────────
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a => {
  a.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const t = document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));
    if (t) { e.preventDefault(); window.scrollTo({top: t.getBoundingClientRect().top + window.scrollY - 80, behavior:'smooth'}); }
  });
});

// ── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
renderProducts('all');
</script>

</body>
</html>
